long_description:
[MON] Sysdig Agents Not Deployed is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/sysdig_agents_not_deployed.html
TIP Situation: Sysdig agents are not deployed on some nodes
TIP Short Description: Sysdig agents are not deployed on some nodes in us-south-ngdc-test-staging01-zone2-edge for the past 24 hours
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-platform-integration:us-south-ngdc-test::us-south-ngdc-test-staging01-zone2-edge::
IPOPS Enabled: False

Event Generated:

Severity:         Medium
Metric:
    sum by (agent_tag_cluster, agent_tag_crn_location)(kube_node_status_condition{condition="Ready", kube_node_status="true", agent_tag_cluster_type=~"genctl_zonelet|genctl_control|rias"}) > sum by (agent_tag_cluster, agent_tag_crn_location)(sysdig_host_up{agent_tag_cluster_type=~"genctl_zonelet|genctl_control|rias"}) = 8
Segment:
    agent_tag_cluster = 'us-south-ngdc-test-staging01-zone2-edge' and agent_tag_crn_location = 'us-south-ngdc-test'

Time:             12/01/2025 07:57 AM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://us-south.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/910302c05d5e49f791b39ccad7167b2b/31cd1241-2f66-4bbc-ae24-1fd27bd261a5?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F179231147%2Fdetails

------

    Everywhere
